title: More Structures | Nether
description: This mod adds several Vanilla like Structures to the Nether
body:
# More Structures
## Nether
### 📜Description:
_This mod adds **Vanilla** like Structures to the Nether._

### 🏰Structures
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

#### Nether Bunker - Nether Wastes
![The Nether Bunker with no Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18b8584161024660958993d7b0831c57bdf80f91_0.webp)
![The Nether Bunker with Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e085d59d86d8d1ae47b1354eed3ec17a765386a3_0.webp)

#### Netherite Forge - Basalt Deltas
![The Netherite Forge with no Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a96ca9b045859535ca4e7dcb022743fc5a6a9895_0.webp)
![The Netherite Forge with Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0373d3c91b0bc5ef34cee3943231dafad99be81b_0.webp)

#### Reinforced Piglin Tower - Crimson Forest
![The Reinforced Piglin Tower with no Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4cee5dd85bc9c66c10336a046ee699f2f55c68de_0.webp)
![The Reinforced Piglin Tower with Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4f8a2c3378c477bbeafd08189004317a19bc040_0.webp)

#### Soul Temple - Soul Sand Valley
![The Soul Temple with no Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21a889af8e04b95c7a73d62fe88758a7c61e05f7_0.webp)
![The Soul Temple with Shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c21ceba487e2a61873e531d881fc41787d51bd3_0.webp)

</details>

### 🧩Loot Tables (Compatibility):
For chests I sticked to 100% Vanilla Loot Tables.
That means this mod is mostly compatiblie with mods that add items to Vanilla Loot Tables, e.g. Farmers Delight, Quark, Supplementaries and many more.
But i also used some more uncommon Loot Tables like the Piglin Bartering.
Like that i tried to make the chest loot as most fitting as possible.

### ℹ️More Information:
This is the second mod of a series i started working on. If you have any questions about this mod or the next ones, feel free to write a comment on the Curse Forge page of this mod.\
Have a great day :D\
r_y_o_t_o
